headline: MARKET WRAP — Jun 11
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Jun 11, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Markets displayed clear risk-on conviction as volatility collapsed and industrial sectors led broad-based rotation away from defensives. Semiconductor equipment and copper miners signaled renewed confidence in the growth cycle, while privacy coins surged on regulatory optimism. Tomorrow's setup favors continued cyclical outperformance if industrial momentum sustains.
